hooks.prompt: If the file path ends with .env, .env.local, or any file containing secrets (keys, tokens, passwords), BLOCK the edit and ask the user for explicit confirmation before proceeding.
If the Bash command includes git add with .env, .env.local, .env.* or files matching *.env*, BLOCK and warn about committing secrets. Remind user to add to .gitignore instead.
If the edited file is TypeScript or TSX (ends with .ts or .tsx), run `pnpm --filter portal type-check` to verify types. Report any errors.
If the edited file is under apps/portal/ or packages/, run `pnpm lint` to verify linting. Report any errors.

If the edited file is under apps/portal/ or packages/ui/ and is a TSX component, verify it does NOT use `font-bold`, `font-semibold`, `bg-white/5`, `border-white/10`, `text-white/50`, `text-white/70`, `shadow`, `box-shadow`, or direct `clsx`/`twMerge` imports. Report any violations.
If the edited file is a test file (*.test.ts, *.test.tsx, *.spec.ts), run `pnpm --filter portal test -- --testPathPattern=<file_name>` to verify the test passes. Report any failures.
